ingredients_text: DRIED POTATOES, VEGETABLE OIL (CORN, COTTONSEED, HIGH OLEIC SOYBEAN, SUNFLOWER OIL), DEGERMINATED YELLOW CORN FLOUR, CORNSTARCH, RICE FLOUR, MALTODEXTRIN, MONO -  AND DIGLYCERIDES, SALT, WHEAT STARCH.
ingredients_text_en: DRIED POTATOES, VEGETABLE OIL (CORN, COTTONSEED, HIGH OLEIC SOYBEAN, SUNFLOWER OIL), DEGERMINATED YELLOW CORN FLOUR, CORNSTARCH, RICE FLOUR, MALTODEXTRIN, MONO -  AND DIGLYCERIDES, SALT, WHEAT STARCH.
ingredients_text_en_imported: Dried potatoes, vegetable oil (contains one or more of the following: corn oil, cottonseed oil, soybean oil, and/or sunflower oil), degerminated yellow corn flour, cornstarch, rice flour, maltodextrin, mono-and diglycerides, salt, wheat starch.
ingredients_text_es: PAPAS SECAS, ACEITE VEGETAL (MAÍZ, SEMILLA DE ALGODÓN, SOYA ALTO OLEICO, ACEITE DE GIRASOL), HARINA DE MAÍZ AMARILLO DESGERMINADO, MAICENA, HARINA DE ARROZ, MALTODEXTRINA, MONO Y DIGLICÉRIDOS, SAL, ALMIDÓN DE TRIGO.
